description: ADR-039 illustrative -- Movate fleet HEALTH pane: error rate by job-kind (per docs/observability.md, MDK does NOT emit a per-route HTTP metric; the 'route' axis degrades to 'kind'), deploy success rate by CalVer, active alerts by customer, revision stability grid. Tagged 'illustrative -- pending ADR 039 sign-off; assumes a customer template variable resolves either via Lighthouse subscription scope (Phase 1) or via the customer OTel attribute (Phase 2)'.

options.content:
### Health + reliability -- runbook

**What this pane answers:** what is BROKEN, where, and is it because of a recent CalVer? Error rate by `kind` (the closest fleet proxy for 'route' -- per `docs/observability.md` MDK does NOT emit per-route HTTP metrics), deploy success rate by CalVer, the active alert load across customers, revision stability per (customer, deployment).

**Normal:** error rate by kind sits under each customer's SLO (typically <1% non-success; <0.1% dead-letter). Deploy success rate per CalVer >= 95% across the fleet. Active alerts per customer ~ 0-1 at any time.

**If red:**
* **Error rate spike on one customer, one kind** -- check the per-customer dashboard from PR #518 first (single-deployment scope); cross-reference `mdk.jobs.completed{status='error'}` and `status='dead_letter'`.
* **Deploy success rate dips on a new CalVer** -- annotate the CalVer release (top-of-page annotation, TODO source); if multiple customers fail on the same CalVer, page release engineering.
* **Alert count rising across multiple customers** -- correlated fleet incident, e.g. a shared provider outage; check `usage.json` provider mix for a routing-pattern shift.

**Hidden assumptions** (per `docs/observability.md`): `status` values are `success` / `error` / `safety_blocked` / `dead_letter`. Dead-letter rate is NOT a separate instrument -- it's the `status='dead_letter'` slice of `mdk.jobs.completed`. There is NO per-route HTTP metric today.

**Cross-refs:** ADR 020 (OTLP -> AM pipeline), ADR 034 (data-plane scalability + dead-letter discipline), ADR 027 (`mdk dev` and CalVer release flow).

panels.description: Error rate = non-success terminal jobs / all terminal jobs, split by job kind. Per docs/observability.md MDK has no per-route HTTP metric; the route axis degrades to 'kind'.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == 'mdk.jobs.completed'
| extend cust = tostring(Properties['customer']), kind = tostring(Properties['kind']), status = tostring(Properties['status'])
| where cust in ($customer) or '$customer' == 'All'
| summarize Total = sum(ValueSum), Bad = sumif(ValueSum, status != 'success') by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), kind
| extend ErrorRate = todouble(Bad) / todouble(iff(Total > 0, Total, 1))
| project TimeGenerated, kind, ErrorRate
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Error rate by kind

panels.description: Dead-letter rate -- slice of mdk.jobs.completed where status='dead_letter'. Treated specially because ADR 034's DLQ discipline lifts dead-letter from a noisy error to a fleet-level reliability signal.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == 'mdk.jobs.completed'
| extend cust = tostring(Properties['customer']), status = tostring(Properties['status'])
| where cust in ($customer) or '$customer' == 'All'
| summarize Total = sum(ValueSum), DLQ = sumif(ValueSum, status == 'dead_letter') by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| extend DLQRate = todouble(DLQ) / todouble(iff(Total > 0, Total, 1))
| project TimeGenerated, DLQRate

panels.title: Dead-letter rate (fleet)

panels.description: Per-CalVer success rate computed from mdk.jobs.completed status mix in the first 24h after each deployment of that CalVer. Service.version is the OTel resource attribute carrying CalVer YYYY.M.D.N.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == 'mdk.jobs.completed'
| extend cust = tostring(Properties['customer']), ver = tostring(Properties['service.version']), status = tostring(Properties['status'])
| where cust in ($customer) or '$customer' == 'All'
| where isnotempty(ver)
| summarize Total = sum(ValueSum), Good = sumif(ValueSum, status == 'success') by ver, cust
| extend SuccessRate = todouble(Good) / todouble(iff(Total > 0, Total, 1))
| project CalVer = ver, Customer = cust, Total, SuccessRate
| order by CalVer desc

panels.title: Deploy success rate by CalVer x customer

panels.description: Active alert rows in the AM AlertsManagement table across the delegated subscriptions. Phase 1 reads the per-customer AlertsManagement records via Lighthouse; Phase 2 reads the central workspace's mirror.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AlertsManagementResources
| where Properties.essentials.alertState == 'New' or Properties.essentials.alertState == 'Acknowledged'
| extend cust = tostring(Properties.essentials.targetResource)
| project AlertName = name, Severity = tostring(Properties.essentials.severity), Customer = cust, FiredAt = todatetime(Properties.essentials.startDateTime)
| order by FiredAt desc
| limit 50

panels.title: Active alerts by customer

panels.description: Revision-stability status grid: each (customer, deployment) cell colored by recent error+dead-letter rate. Green = under 1%, amber = 1-5%, red = >5%. Read straight off mdk.jobs.completed status mix in the last hour.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == 'mdk.jobs.completed'
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| extend cust = tostring(Properties['customer']), depl = tostring(Properties['deployment']), status = tostring(Properties['status'])
| where cust in ($customer) or '$customer' == 'All'
| summarize Total = sum(ValueSum), Bad = sumif(ValueSum, status != 'success') by cust, depl
| extend BadRate = todouble(Bad) / todouble(iff(Total > 0, Total, 1))
| project Cell = strcat(cust, ' / ', depl), BadRate
| order by Cell asc

panels.title: Revision stability (last hour) by (customer, deployment)

list.definition: Phase 1: Lighthouse subscription scope. Phase 2: hashed customer OTel resource attribute (ADR 039 D4).
list.label: customer
list.name: customer

title: Movate fleet -- health + reliability (illustrative, ADR 039)
